pages.text: Replicating Scylla's wrath, this spell requires continuous casting, where the caster will emit whirlwinds and storm clouds around them, before unleashing a barrage of water and lightning spears at where they're looking from the clouds above.
Casting with $(l:crafts/staff/storm_staff)Storm Staff$() shoots more lightning spears and causes them to deal extra damage based on the target's max health.
